source: Advertising Muslim group criticizes Burger King ad Des Moines , Iowa -- Burger King Corp . said it will modify a commercial airing on black radio stations to remove what some listeners may consider offensive content . A company spokesman said the hamburger chain will change the name of a coffeehouse poet in the spot who reads an ode to a Whopper bacon cheddar burger . In the original ad the person 's name was Rasheed -- to which the Council on American-Islamic Relations took offense . The Muslim group issued a press release noting that Islam prohibits the consumption of pork products . Burger King spokesman Robert Doughty told Dow Jones Newswires the ad will be re-recorded so that the poet will be introduced as " Willie . "

On Oct. 7 , 1943 , 98 American POWs who remained were blindfolded and shot in the back ; after the war , the admiral who ordered their deaths was hanged as a war criminal and the bones of the POWs were moved to Hickam Field in Honolulu , where a memorial stands today .

source: At the same time that today 's pop-to-classical crossover artists are evidencing more ambition than the rock bands of days past ( Moody Blues , Procol Harum , Deep Purple ) that used an orchestra as a mere backdrop , the idea of classical music itself is being revised . It can be newer , more immediate and punchier , which is the philosophy of Sony Classical president Peter Gelb , the unofficial godfather of this movement .
domestication: 与此同时，当今的流行到古典音乐跨界艺术家们展现出远超过去摇滚乐队（如Moody Blues、Procol Harum、Deep Purple）的雄心壮志，他们只把管弦乐队当作背景板一样使用。古典音乐本身的概念也正在被重新定义，它可以更现代、更直接、更有力，这是索尼古典音乐总裁彼得·盖尔布的哲学，他是这一运动的非官方教父。

与此同时，当今的流行音乐到古典音乐的跨界艺术家们展现出比过去的摇滚乐队（如 Moody Blues ，Procol Harum ，Deep Purple ）更大的野心，过去的摇滚乐队只把管弦乐队当作背景，而现在古典音乐的概念也正在被修订。它可以更新、更直接、更有力，这是索尼古典音乐公司总裁Peter Gelb 的理念，他是这场运动的非官方教父。

source: With the taboos broken , the sexual content of television reached a new high -- or low -- in the mid-1970 's . Amid the disillusion surrounding Watergate and the dissoluteness of the disco era , Fred Silverman , then the programming guru at ABC , ushered in such " jigglefests " as " Three 's Company . " That phenomenally successful show , which ran from 1977 to 1984 , was essentially a reworking of classic bedroom farce ; virtually every joke sprang from the theoretically comedic situation of two women sharing an apartment with a lusty male roommate who had convinced the landlord that he was gay .

source: While the spaghettini is cooking , in a wok or large saute pan , heat the oil over medium-high heat . Add the scallions and ginger and cook , stirring , for 2 minutes . Add the onion and cook for 3 to 4 minutes . Add the snow peas , mushrooms , bok choy and carrots ; the wok will be full . Carefully stir together the vegetables . source: By listening to everything that is happening in your house , as these bots do , they learn how we think , live , work and play . They are gathering massive amounts of data about us . And that raises a dark side of this technology : The privacy risks and possible misuse by technology companies . Neither Amazon nor Google is forthcoming about what it is doing with all of the data it gathers and how it will protect us from hackers who exploit weaknesses in the infrastructure leading to its servers .
domestication: 这些智能设备就像无处不在的“千里眼”，时刻在关注着家里发生的一切。通过对我们日常生活的监听，它们正在学习我们的思考方式、生活习惯、工作和娱乐方式。它们收集了大量关于我们的数据，这也带来了技术的一个黑暗面：隐私风险和科技公司可能的滥用行为。亚马逊和谷歌都没有公开说明他们会如何处理收集到的数据，以及如何保护我们免受黑客攻击，防止服务器漏洞被利用。这样一来，我们的隐私就像悬在半空中，任人宰割。

source: Google and Amazon have both opened up their devices to third-party developers - who in turn have added the abilities to order pizza , book tickets , turn on lights and make phone calls . We will soon see these bots connected to health and fitness devices so that they can help people devise better exercise regimens and remember to take their medicine . And they will control the dishwasher and the microwave , track what is left in the refrigerator and order an ambulance in a case of emergency .

source: Throughout its nine-season history , Opera Colorado is the only major opera company in the world to take on the challenges of the round , and succeed . Productions whirl with movement and color . The intimate gesture replaces the broad display . source: The treaty has special significance in the recent history of arms control agreements . Signed in December 1987 by President Reagan and Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev , it has been credited with helping accelerate an end to the Cold War and lessening the danger of nuclear confrontation . It stands as the only arms treaty to eliminate an entire class of U.S. and Russian weapons -- nuclear and conventional ground-launched ballistic and cruise missiles of intermediate range .
domestication: 这份条约在近代武器控制协议的历史中具有特殊意义。1987年12月，由里根总统和苏联领导人戈尔巴乔夫签署，这项条约因帮助加速结束冷战，并降低了核对抗的危险而受到赞誉。它是唯一一份完全消除美国和俄罗斯整类武器的军控条约——中程地面弹道导弹和巡航导弹，无论是核导弹还是常规导弹。这在当时可真是件天大的事儿啊，一举两得，既减少了核战争的风险，又缓解了东西方的紧张局势。可以说，这份条约是结束冷战的重要一步，是人类共同努力和平的成果。
foreignization: 该条约在近期的裁军协议史上具有特殊意义。 1987年12月，由总统里根和苏联领导人米哈伊尔·戈尔巴乔夫签署 ，被认为有助于加速结束冷战并减少核对抗的危险。 它是唯一一个能够消除美国和俄罗斯的一整类武器的裁军条约 -- 中程核和常规地面发射弹道导弹和巡航导弹。

source: A summer-long dispute between Clayton County and Atlanta over police jurisdiction at Hartsfield International Airport ended Thursday , according to Clayton Commission Chairman Crandle Bray . Clayton narcotics officers have been issued security clearance to conduct investigations at the airport , working independently of both Atlanta and federal drug agents . Clayton officers had been denied access to the airport after the county withdrew from a drug task force operated by the DEA .

source: Andy and I had honeymooned here in 1982 and promised ourselves that someday we would return . That was three children and what seems like a lifetime ago . I was excited but nervous , too . As we bounced along the rutted road for 45 minutes after midnight through a rain forest , I wondered if the place could possibly match our romantic memories . Unlike many couples , we 'd truly had a perfect honeymoon - basking in the sun , dancing under the stars , eating drawn-out gourmet meals amid hibiscus and bougainvillea .

domestication: 这些大规模的营销活动会不会冒犯那些传统主义者呢？哈雷戴维森档案管理员之一马丁·杰克·罗森布鲁姆（Martin Jack Rosenblum）说：“我并不认为这是个问题。”他曾参与了这家咖啡馆的项目，自己就是一名哈雷摩托的铁杆粉丝，并且拥有英语博士学位，还是一名前教授。他常常穿着黑色牛仔裤，系着哈雷摩托的腰带扣，外面披着粗花呢夹克。1989年，他还出版了一本诗集《圣骑士》（The Holy Ranger），专门讲述他所说的“哈雷神话”。
